name: Sonora Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup sweet red pepper, finely chopped
2 tablespoons jalapeno peppers, seeded, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the cheeses together in the top of a double boiler over simmering water for 5 to 10 minutes.
2. Stir in the green onion, red pepper, and jalapeno pepper.
3. Serve hot with tortilla chips.
